steps.title: Use the future-access clue
steps.content: The museum maintains thousands of Harris's photographs so audiences can continue to view them well into the future. The blank must describe protecting or keeping the photographs in lasting condition.

steps.title: Reject actions that do not protect
steps.content: A would replace the photographs, B would create new ones, and D would merely tally them. None would explain continued future viewing. The needed action is maintaining existing photographs over time. The answer is C.
